MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.neural_avatar
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/neural_avatar.py (415 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Neural Avatar - MuseTalk/StyleAvatar integration for photorealistic lip sync
Provides cutting-edge neural rendering for the VTuber avatar

CLASSES:
- NeuralAvatarConfig: Configuration for neural avatar rendering
- MuseTalkAvatar: MuseTalk integration for real-time lip sync

MuseTalk provides:
- 30fps+ real-ti
  Methods: async def initialize(self, face_image_path: Optional[str]=None) -> bool

  Methods: async def generate_video_segment(self, audio: np.ndarray, sample_rate: int=16000, chunk_size: int=16
  Methods: def get_latent_representation(self) -> Optional[np.ndarray]
  Methods: async def cleanup(self)
- SadTalkerAvatar: SadTalker integration for 3D-aware lip sync

SadTalker provides:
- 3DMM-based fa

- NeuralAvatarManager: Manager for neural avatar backends

Handles:
